cards.back: A type of classifier in pattern classification by prototype matching, which classifies a pattern by finding the prototype (or prototype closest to it) with the smallest distance
A method of pattern classification where a pattern is matched against a set of known prototypes to find the best match based on similarity
A measure used to calculate the distance between a pattern and its corresponding prototype, commonly used in Minimum Distance Classifier
Common distance metrics used in Minimum Distance Classifier include Euclidean distance, Manhattan distance, and Minkowski distance
The process of selecting the prototype with the smallest distance to the input pattern in Minimum Distance Classifier
